# Conflict matrix

| Society | Adventure | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Stability | Adaptability | [Injected stability](../../Features/Injected%20stability%2054190f7026bf4beb96bc5ef39de248ee.md)  |
| Community | Serendipitous allies |  |
| Debate | Combat |  |
| Stationary | Roaming | [](../../Inspirations/Traversal%20types%207b18379ab4464c01af4f251e780e19a8.md)  |
| Order | Chaos | [Chaotic world](../../Features/Chaotic%20world%2015258e628ba2805abd70e0c63f03c571.md)  |
| Peace | Tension | [Temporal continuity](../../Features/Temporal%20continuity%201d458e628ba2808eb64cdd3f14410df6.md)  |
| Contented | Discontent | [Contented impetus](../../Articles/Contented%20impetus%2068fcf8588dda4e4b9f76a60bacc69428.md)  |
| Amiable | Desperate | [Desperation](../../Features/Desperation%203c8bb63bea1440cba5eb8b570cecec24.md)  |
| Law | Lawless |  |
| Gentleman | Rogue | Mr. Darcy vs. Indiana Jones |

Adventure is about adaptability.  Pure adventure teams are circumstantial and can involve reluctant cooperation.
